## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / DX only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run verify:all`
- [ ] `npm run test:ci`
- [ ] `npm run build` (or note if skipped and why)
- [ ] Forward-only DB changes (no edits to already-applied migrations)
- [ ] RLS / security impact documented if applicable
- [ ] UI change: screenshot or recording attached
